entries.title: LG 9-company OpenDART/KRX identifier verification
entries.selectionReason: Company-scoped routing is required before local IR materials can enter a common source-to-claim harness.

entries.title: LG 9-company local IR source inventory
entries.selectionReason: Hashes, validates, and reconciles the supplied LG IR files with document-level or official source-page URLs.

entries.title: LG official PDF extraction report
entries.selectionReason: Separates text-bearing PDFs from low-text/OCR and non-PDF blockers before claim promotion.

entries.title: LG narrative claim queue
entries.selectionReason: Keeps LG IR materials out of runtime answers until atomic claims are reviewed and source-backed.

entries.title: LG OpenDART annual financial table 2022-2024
entries.selectionReason: Official API-backed financial baseline for the first LG transfer slice.

entries.title: LG source-backed financial seed claims
entries.selectionReason: Promotes only bounded OpenDART financial claims until local LG IR documents are reviewed.
